page_metadata.biotools__summary: TSEBRA is a combiner tool that selects transcripts from gene predictions based on the support by extrisic evidence in form of introns and start/stop codons. It was developed to combine BRAKER1 and BRAKER2 predicitons to increase their accuracies.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: TSEBRA is a combiner tool that selects transcripts from gene predictions based on the support by extrisic evidence in form of introns and start/stop codons. It was developed to combine BRAKER1 and BRAKER2 predicitons to increase their accuracies.
page_metadata.galaxy__summary: This tool has been developed to combine BRAKER predictions.
page_metadata.galaxy__bio_tools_summary: TSEBRA is a combiner tool that selects transcripts from gene predictions based on the support by extrisic evidence in form of introns and start/stop codons. It was developed to combine BRAKER1 and BRAKER2 predicitons to increase their accuracies.
